items.title: Transfers PSV: Fulham doet vernieuwd bod op Pepi
items.summary: VI volgt het transfernieuws bij PSV op de voet. De doelwitten van de Eindhovenaren, duiding van de clubwatcher, of aandacht in buitenlandse media. We verzamelen alles hier.

items.title: VI Live: Volendam en Go Ahead sluiten speelronde 21 af
items.summary: Welkom in de VI Live van zondag 1 februari. Hier nemen we je mee in drie Eredivisie-duels, een topper in Engeland en alle andere hoogtepunten op de (inter)nationale velden.

items.title: Wereldgoal van Solanke kost Man City opnieuw de volle buit tegen Spurs
items.summary: De recente geschiedenis wijst uit dat Manchester City niet graag tegen Tottenham Hotspur speelt. Dat bleek zondag opnieuw. De ploeg van Pep Guardiola ging comfortabel aan de leiding, maar verspeelde door een discutabel doelpunt en een absolute wereldgoal van Dominic Solanke wéér punten tegen Spurs.

items.title: Ajax koploper af, Obispo redt punt in extremis voor Feyenoord tegen PSV
items.summary: In dit blog volgen we alle ontwikkelingen in het vrouwenvoetbal. We besteden onder meer aandacht aan de Eurojackpot Vrouwen Eredivisie, de Europese toernooien en het Nederlands elftal.

items.title: Tottenham v Man City: Premier League – live
items.summary: ⚽️ Updates from the 4.30pm (GMT) kick-off ⚽️ Live scores | Full table | Follow on Bluesky | Mail Dominic An email from Spurs fan SF Devereux: As well as those eight you mentioned (Maddison, Kulusevski, Kudus, van de Ven, Bentancur, Bergvall, Porro and Davies), we’re also without Richarlison, Kevin Danso, Djed Spence and Wilson Odobert. We just need a goalkeeper to go down injured today and we’ll have a pretty competitive, tactically balanced XI missing, with a couple of options available to come off the bench. Continue reading...

items.title: Championship talking points: Are Middlesbrough now promotion favourites as Coventry slip again?
Bellingham injured for Madrid, 'an important loss'...
items.summary: Jude Bellingham was substituted early in Real Madrid's LaLiga game with Rayo Vallecano on Sunday, forced off with what appeared to be a hamstring injury.

items.title: Carrick hails 'big talent' Sesko after United winn...
items.summary: Michael Carrick called Benjamin Sesko a "big talent" after the Manchester United forward climbed off the substitutes' bench to score a stoppage-time winner in the 3-2 Old Trafford victory against Fulham.

items.title: Mbappé scores last-gasp pen as Madrid edge Rayo
items.summary: Kylian Mbappé's penalty in the 10th minute of stoppage time secured a dramatic 2-1 victory for Real Madrid over lowly Rayo Vallecano to cut Barcelona's lead at the top of LaLiga.

items.title: Jans belde met Farioli over kersverse aanwinst: 'Hij had gelijk'
items.summary: Ron Jans heeft eindelijk weer een reden om te lachen. De trainer van FC Utrecht was lovend over zijn nieuwe aanwinst, die direct van waarde was tegen SC Heerenveen ( 1-1 ). Over de Spanjaard had Jans nog contact met Francesco Farioli.

items.title: 'Extraordinary!' | Solanke scores sensational SCORPION KICK equaliser
items.summary: Solanke scores SCORPION KICK equaliser for Spurs against Manchester City in the Premier League.

items.title: Banton clinches England series win on record-breaking day for Buttler
items.summary: Jos Buttler's record-setting 402nd England appearance came in a series-sealing victory as captain Harry Brook's cameo and Tom Banton's half-century smoked the tourists to a six-wicket win in a rain-trimmed second T20 against Sri Lanka in Pallekele.

items.title: 'A hint of hope!' | Guehi own-goal halves Spurs' deficit
items.summary: Guehi own-goal halves Spurs' deficit against Manchester City in the Premier League.

items.title: Aston Villa latest: Emery rules out further signings on Deadline Day
European live updates: Man United look to continue...
Carrick's calm amid the chaos is exactly what Man ...
items.summary: Michael Carrick has three wins from three games in charge at Man United.

items.title: Wolves accept reduced £48m offer for Strand Larsen
items.summary: Wolves have accepted a reduced offer worth £48m for striker Jorgen Strand Larsen from Crystal Palace.

items.title: Sesko seals dramatic win over Fulham to continue Manchester United revival
items.summary: Benjamin Sesko will never forget the sweet pirouette-and-finish that burst Bernd Leno’s net in stoppage time to earn Manchester United a dramatic victory over Fulham. Only 180 seconds earlier Kevin had curled a peach of an equaliser past Senne Lammens in the 92nd minute that hushed the Old Trafford faithful and seemed to have grabbed a point for the visitors. Continue reading...

items.title: Kerolin crushes Chelsea’s WSL hopes to send Manchester City 11 points clear at top
items.summary: Chelsea’s reign as English women’s football’s top team is over after Manchester City dismantled the champions to open up a surely unassailable lead at the top of the Women’s Super League. In an emphatic victory that will be symbolic of the ongoing changing of the guard, Kerolin scored a hat-trick as the runaway leaders won 5-1 at a jubilant Etihad Stadium and their fans were chanting “easy, easy, easy” before the end. Continue reading...

items.title: Saint-Maximin leaves club over racist abuse of his children
items.summary: Former Newcastle United winger Allan Saint-Maximin leaves Mexican side Club America by mutual consent after saying his children were the victims of racist abuse.
